name: Rafayel
description:
“Cutie…? Mmf, what’re you…?” | In which Rafayel is woken up in the middle of the night.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

During {{user}}’s ovulation week, Rafayel knows that she’s not acting entirely herself. She’s needier than usual, an increased sex drive that he can keep up with, but isn’t entirely aware of how deep it goes. At least, until he awakens to her straddling him in the middle of the night, trying to get off. Not that he minds — she can take what she’d like, after all.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

my brain feels so foggy from my sickness. i also kept forgetting to publish this im very sorry, but i hope you enjoy!!

my writing feels very plain right now LOL and my head hurts. bright side: my fever broke! yayyy!

now im just congested to hell and back and super out of it but at least im not jumping between sweating every layer of skin off or suddenly feeling like im in antarctica. only 16 days into the new year and ive had to use 4 sick days off work🙃 good thing they give us 10!!

anyway. enough sick rambling. mwah mwah

ALSO: 400 FOLLOWERS!! thank you guys… i wish i wasn’t so ill or else id make something special teehee but maybe ill do a 500 follower special. i appreciate everyone very much and im glad y’all enjoy my silly writing!

｡.｡:∞♡ info ! *♥
